minimalFormError: Fill in the destination number and the task instruction.
browserModeRequiresTask: Write the task instruction first before opening browser mode.
workspaceSubtitle: Select a call to review its status, events, and transcript.
callListErrorDescription: The backend did not respond correctly. You can return to the main page and try again.
callListEmptyDescription: Started calls will appear here as soon as you begin using the app.
callActionsDescription: Escalate to a person, join from the browser, or terminate the active call.
liveEventsDescription: Latest webhooks and orchestration events received for this call.
eventsEmptyDescription: Events will appear here once the call starts moving.
transcriptDescription: Detected utterances and generated responses are stored here.
transcriptEmptyDescription: Once the call begins, each phrase and speaker will appear here.
historyEmptyDescription: Select a call from history to inspect all details.
browserMicUnavailable: This browser does not expose speech recognition. Try Chrome or Edge.
browserLiveError: Could not get a response from the agent.
browserRecognitionError: There was a problem capturing your voice. Please try again.
browserMissingTaskDescription: Go back to the main page, write the call objective, and then reopen browser mode.
browserLiveSubtitle: Speak in natural turns. The browser listens, sends each utterance to the agent, and plays the reply aloud.
browserLiveEmptyDescription: As soon as we detect your first utterance, the conversation will appear here.
